creator: fugswa@posteo.de
text:
Yes. I’m running Debian 11 and just downloaded the amd64 qcow2 virtual machine image of FreeBSD 13.0 and am getting the same page fault when using the QEMU option -cpu host. My CPU is an AMD Ryzen 9 5950X.


Does not work:

qemu-system-x86_64 -enable-kvm -cpu host -m 2048 -hda FreeBSD-13.0-RELEASE-amd64.qcow2

Does work:

qemu-system-x86_64 -enable-kvm -m 2048 -hda FreeBSD-13.0-RELEASE-amd64.qcow2
